# Task: Integration tests, naming guard, docs

> Task ID: GROVE-S02-T07
> Sprint: [GROVE-S02](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📝 draft
> Estimate: M

## Description

End-to-end hardening: tests/cli.rs coverage for grove config non-TTY, init idempotency (re-run duplicates nothing), allowlist enforcement (config omitting find refuses it at dispatch); repo-wide naming-guard test (no fastcontext string in core/, cli/, README.md, skills/); README + CHANGELOG sections for mcp-llm mode, grove config, and health/shutdown semantics; stack-checklist review (MCP schema plainness, stdio hygiene, exit codes).
